# S4ModApi vendored ABI files

The files `S4ModApi.h` and `S4ModApi.lib` are copied without modification from:

- Repository: https://github.com/nyfrk/S4ModApi
- Commit: `bb5d40ead1bb2a111ec0f787a6da5c15e130684e`
- Release tag: `v2.3`
- Header source: `S4ModApi/S4ModApi.h`
- Import library source: `Examples/HelloWorld/HelloWorld/S4ModApi.lib`

S4ModApi is licensed under the GNU Lesser General Public License version 3.
The upstream copyright and license notice remains in the public header. See
the upstream repository for the complete corresponding source and license
texts.
